title: AAP multi-signature token container (AAP-SPEC section 9.4)
description: JWS General JSON Serialization (RFC 7515 section 7.2.1) — the vehicle for AAP's per-signature suite model (AAP-SPEC section 8.2). Each signatures[] entry carries its own protected header (alg + kid) over the same payload; this is isomorphic to the ATX/ATP {keyId, algorithm, value} model. A hybrid credential carries one Ed25519 entry and one ML-DSA-65 entry, and every declared entry MUST verify. `payload` and each `protected`/`signature` are base64url without padding.
